generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for heatbed temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTempDataTransmitted
]

instance ChamberTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for chamber temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberTempDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance ChamberTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberTemperatureSensor
]

instance AmbientTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance HeatbedTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Heatbed temperature sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ChamberTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Chamber temperature sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChamberTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with 2 parameters using differential equations for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with 4 parameters using differential equations for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling GPIO and sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MOSFETs handling ~4A current for heatbed and fan control"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optocouplers for electrical isolation in PCB control circuitry"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts temperature using calibrated thermal models to inform control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveTemperatureSimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors temperature for safety compliance in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Regulates temperature using bang-bang control based on predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance PredictiveTemperatureSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used to inform control decisions"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected requiring human intervention"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from optimization"
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed and fan for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyViolationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger for human intervention due to safety violation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "0.03 m³ styrofoam insulated incubator system"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, AmbientTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, ChamberTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed for temperature control"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow for cooling"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for control circuitry"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the incubator system"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuator controlled via MOSFETs handling ~4A current"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver for actuation of physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system integrates physical components (heatbed, fan, sensors), RabbitMQ communication layer, controller logic, and simulation models for bidirectional data exchange and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates during the as-operated phase of the physical system's lifecycle, integrating models post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity assessed through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1) and residual error minimization using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver; Model B demonstrated superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitates communication between physical components and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) are hosted on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain operational safety; optocouplers provide electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators."
]
